title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Plugins Without a Payment Processor — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: As a digital creator in a country where PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, or Payhip are blocked, you're faced with a daunting task: selling your plugins without a payment processor. In Nigeria, for example, digital sellers are denied access to payment services due to 'federal regulations.' Meanwhile, in countries like Venezuela and Iran, economic sanctions restrict the use of popular payment platforms. The question remains: how can you monetize your expertise without PayPal or similar services? The stakes are high: missing out on revenue can slow your project's momentum and impact your business's growth potential. The good news is that there's a reliable alternative: Core Shop Engine ($49.99) is a full-featured, no-KYC payment processor that empowers creators to sell digital products seamlessly, without restrictions.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are well-known but restricted payment processors. Each platform has its set of terms and conditions, making it challenging for creators from blocked countries to sell their digital products. PayPal, for instance, has a 'terms of service' that clearly states it will not process payments from countries that are under economic sanctions, and Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan are among those countries. Stripe, too, has a set of 'terms and conditions' that excludes users from countries with questionable or unstable banking systems. Gumroad, while more flexible, still operates under the restrictions imposed by the US government's Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC). In contrast, Core Shop Engine offers a comprehensive, no-KYC payment solution that allows creators to sell their digital products worldwide without the need for a payment processor account or any form of verification.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip exclude specific countries due to various reasons such as economic sanctions, federal regulations, or bank limitations. In these cases, digital creators are left without a reliable means to monetize their digital products. Core Shop Engine, on the other hand, works seamlessly in these restricted countries, thanks to its partnership with NOWPayments, a crypto-native payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies and has no KYC requirements. This means creators can sell their digital products without worrying about being blocked or restricted due to their location or banking situation.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed, fees, and real costs are critical factors to consider when choosing a payment processor. PayPal and Stripe charge a flat fee of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction, while Gumroad charges 3.5% + $0.30 per sale. In contrast, Core Shop Engine offers a flat fee of 2.5% per transaction, making it a cost-effective option for creators. Furthermore, Core Shop Engine provides instant automated delivery, ensuring that customers receive their digital products immediately after payment, which can significantly improve customer satisfaction and retention.
You don't need a Stripe account to sell digital products; Core Shop Engine offers a seamless payment solution.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation and delivery capabilities are essential for a seamless selling experience. PayPal and Stripe require manual intervention for delivery, which can lead to delays and customer dissatisfaction. Gumroad offers automated delivery but requires creators to set up each product manually. Core Shop Engine, however, comes equipped with a bot engine that automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it a convenient and efficient option for creators.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Choosing crypto-native infrastructure does not mean your buyers need to understand crypto. The Web3 Wallet Connect module generates QR codes for each supported coin, displays live USD-equivalent prices, and guides buyers through the payment flow in plain language. Most buyers complete a crypto payment in under two minutes, even if it is their first time. NOWPayments handles the transaction confirmation and fires the webhook that triggers automated delivery. From the buyer's perspective, they paid and received their product. From your perspective, you received funds in a wallet you control without any platform intermediary between you and your revenue. That is the practical outcome of building on the right infrastructure from the start.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad may block your account due to country restrictions; Core Shop Engine works everywhere.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're searching for a PayPal alternative or want to sell digital products without Stripe, consider Core Shop Engine, a comprehensive payment solution that empowers creators to sell their products worldwide. Visit the Core Shop Engine demo at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to experience its seamless and automated features. By using Core Shop Engine, you can focus on creating high-quality digital products while leaving the payment and delivery complexities to the experts.
Your Action Checklist

Start by accepting that no PayPal or Stripe workaround is durable — the platforms actively close gaps as they discover them. Create a NOWPayments account and configure wallet addresses for USDT on Tron and Bitcoin as your primary coins. Purchase and deploy the Core Shop Engine — it handles payment verification and automated delivery. Configure the Web3 Wallet Connect module with your product details and checkout settings. Upload your digital product files to your delivery server with the paths configured in the engine. Test the complete flow with a real mainnet transaction — send a small amount to your wallet and confirm the webhook fires and the delivery email arrives. Check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log. Add your store URL to your social profiles and content channels. You now have infrastructure that no payment platform can take from you.
Selling digital products without a payment processor account is now possible with Core Shop Engine's no-KYC payment solution.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
